newsSinceJun6: No material news in the June 6-9 window. Latest items predate it: a $11.2M U.S. Army CBRN drone-detection contract to Teledyne FLIR Defense (June 4, immaterial vs $28B cap) and a new HiRel low-noise amplifier for LEO/MEO satcom (June 3). Teledyne is demoing RF/microwave and sensing products at IMS 2026 in Boston June 9-11 (routine trade show). Minor analyst PT tweaks (Barclays $614 Equal Weight, Stifel $750 Buy) are drift, not thesis-changing. Stock flat today (+0.06%).

sources.label: GuruFocus - Teledyne secures $11.2M Army contract for advanced drone systems (Jun 4, 2026)
StockTitan - Teledyne shows RF, microwave demos at IMS 2026 (Jun 9-11, Boston)
Yahoo Finance - TDY quote and news

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's verdict already moved TDY down to reconcile adjusted-score rank 56; nothing since June 6 changes the setup - the Jun 4 Army contract is rounding-error sized vs a $28B cap and today's tape is flat (+0.06%). On a latent-alpha lens, TDY stays a well-covered, fairly-valued sensing conglomerate with limited hidden asymmetry at rank 56.
verdicts.bull: Teledyne FLIR defense sensing keeps winning drone/CBRN programs and machine vision plus space-grade RF semis (new LEO/MEO amplifier) give multiple AI-adjacent sensing shots on goal.
verdicts.neutral: Solid Q1 (EPS $5.80, revenue +7.6% y/y) and steady small contract flow support the score, but at $28B cap with full sell-side coverage there is no informational edge left; +18% YTD is roughly in line with quality industrials.
verdicts.bear: Valuation already reflects the defense/sensing cycle (Barclays Equal Weight at $614 ~= spot); a slowdown in scientific instrumentation or defense budget slippage compresses the multiple with little alpha cushion.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q2 2026 earnings and any larger FLIR defense/drone program awards scaling beyond the current ~$11M-sized contracts.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded, fully-discovered mega-cap sensing name where YTD gains outpace new fundamental evidence, leaving negative residual alpha on a latent-nodes list.
